stemHtml: A pilot has been prescribed an antidepressant containing psychoactive substances by a psychiatrist but has not informed their AME. Under SERA, may the pilot fly?

options.a: The pilot may fly since the psychiatrist prescribed the medication.
options.b: The pilot must not fly, because such substances impair human performance.
options.c: The pilot must not fly unless a psychoactive substance test comes back negative.
options.d: The pilot may fly because the AME has not been notified of the substances.
